prompt_text:
### Demographics: 50-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~3.8 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 59.5 kg; Height 168.7 cm; BMI 20.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 110/75 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.9%; 9 months ago 10.0%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 9.5%; current 8.5%), FPG (12 months ago 228mg/dL; 9 months ago 281mg/dL; 6 months ago 243mg/dL; 3 months ago 237mg/dL; current 178mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 57.8kg; 9 months ago 56.9kg; 6 months ago 56.2kg; 3 months ago 56.8kg; current 59.5kg), Height (12 months ago 168.7cm; 9 months ago 168.7cm; 6 months ago 168.7cm; 3 months ago 168.7cm; current 168.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 110mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 78mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 75mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 26U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 22U/L), AST (12 months ago 18U/L; 9 months ago 18U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 22U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 101mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; current 99mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 106mg/g; 9 months ago 79mg/g; 6 months ago 77mg/g; 3 months ago 104mg/g; current 85mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 77mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 72mg/dL; current 75mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 55mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 55mg/dL; current 54mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 182mg/dL; 9 months ago 165mg/dL; 6 months ago 165mg/dL; 3 months ago 182mg/dL; current 176mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.7g/dL; 9 months ago 11.7g/dL; 6 months ago 11.7g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 11.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.68 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
